description: First curated, leakage-controlled benchmark for cross-family genome-writer integration efficiency. Label = measured published efficiency (% integration), NON-circular (DOI + verbatim quote per row).
label: efficiency_pct (measured % integration in the stated cell type)

held_out_family.rationale: cross-family transfer — the hard generalisation axis; 4 families is the binding statistical limit (reported honestly).

held_out_locus.rationale: locus-context generalisation within the curated panel.

honest_limit: small curated dataset (~42 human-cell records across 4 families); the dataset + bench are the contribution, and a non-both-axes win retains the KB ranking (the pre-registered, no-fabrication outcome).
